name: PORTSMOUTH SQUARE INC
business: Portsmouth Square Inc. owns and operates a 544-room Hilton hotel in San Francisco, California. The hotel generates revenue from room rentals, food and beverage, parking, and other services. The company also invests in marketable securities, primarily REITs and real estate companies.

exposures.sentence: Cybersecurity risks could disrupt our operations and adversely affect our business, even though no material incidents have occurred.

catalysts.sentence: Matures April 9, 2027, with three one-year extension options, subject to satisfaction of financial and operational covenants.

Mezzanine executed a modified Mezzanine Loan Agreement with CRED REIT Holdco LLC for a principal amount of $36,300,000 at a fixed rate of 7.25% per annum, on matching maturity and extension terms to the senior loan.
On June 26, 2015, Operating and Hilton entered into an amended franchise agreement that, among other things, extended the License Agreement through 2030.

catalysts.event: CBA for Local 2 (Hotel and Restaurant Employees) expiration
catalysts.sentence: CBA for Local 2 (Hotel and Restaurant Employees) will expire on August 13, 2028.

catalysts.event: CBA for Local 856 (International Brotherhood of Teamsters) expiration
catalysts.sentence: CBA for Local 856 (International Brotherhood of Teamsters) will expire on December 31, 2028.
CBA for Local 39 (Stationary Engineers) will expire in July 2030.
